title: Software Engineering Intern (San Francisco)
content: <h2>About Instead</h2><p>Instead is reinventing tax technology. We are the first company in decades to receive IRS approval to e-file for Individuals, C Corps, S Corps, Partnerships, and Estates &amp; Trusts. Our platform empowers tax professionals with AI-driven workflows, automated compliance, and seamless integrations.</p><h2>About the Role</h2><p>Join Instead as a Software Engineering Intern and work alongside our core engineering team in San Francisco. You will contribute to production features, learn from experienced engineers, and gain hands-on experience building the future of tax technology.</p><h2>What You Will Do</h2><ul><li>Build and ship features across our full-stack platform (Vue.js/Nuxt frontend, Go backend)</li><li>Collaborate with product, design, and tax domain experts</li><li>Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and engineering discussions</li><li>Work on real projects that impact thousands of tax professionals</li></ul><h2>What We Are Looking For</h2><ul><li>Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field</li><li>Familiarity with web development (JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS)</li><li>Exposure to backend development (Go, Python, or similar)</li><li>Strong problem-solving skills and eagerness to learn</li><li>Ability to work onsite in San Francisco</li></ul>
